text:
(In reply to Dries Michiels from comment #25)

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/attachment.cgi?id=201850&action=diff tested fine in my poudriere and ygy@ also verified it works.  The only thing I want to check is, this patch removes "Created by" comment, is that ok'd by Ben?
